text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, refers to computer systems designed to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence. This includes learning, reasoning, and problem-solving. A key part of AI is machine learning, where computers improve at tasks by analyzing large amounts of data instead of being explicitly programmed. Deep learning is a more advanced type of machine learning that uses artificial neural networks to recognize complex patterns, like in image or speech recognition. Today, AI has many applications in daily life: virtual assistants like Siri or Alexa answer our questions, streaming services recommend movies, and navigation apps find the fastest routes.
